name: PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk operates as a tinplate manufacturer in Indonesia and internationally. It offers tinplate products in the form of coils, and sheets and scrolls. The company provides tinplate for consumer products, such as food and beverages, canned milk, battery, paints, and chemicals industries. PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
